name: Leek and Potato Soup with Country Ham
recipeIngredient: 10 potatoes, peeled and cut into cubes
1 cup cooked ham, cut into half-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large stock pot, heat cumin, caraway, and fennel seeds over medium heat until lightly toasted and fragrant; do not burn. Remove to a small plate.
2. Add olive oil and heat over medium-low heat.
3. Add leeks and cook until soft, about 5 minutes.
4. Add potatoes, ham, and stock, bring to a boil.
5. Add cabbage and the reserved seeds.
6. Reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are tender, about 15 minutes.
7. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
